pick_garment_from_stack.query: a worker grasps the top folded garment from a stack and lifts it away from the stack

insert_garment_into_bag.query: a worker puts a folded garment into a plastic bag

seal_bag_flap.query: after the garment is inside, a worker folds and presses the narrow adhesive edge of the clear plastic bag to seal it

place_package_to_right.query: a worker lifts the finished sealed garment package from the table and carries it to the right
